action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed with exit 1, error trace from predict.py line 56 inside model.predict. Analysis: Possible root causes: (1) model loading/predict fails due to dimension mismatch or environment, (2) the gym warning may be triggering some hard failure, (3) incorrect normalization shape or NaN. We need to isolate whether model.predict works at all with saved checkpoint. Decision: Write debug_predict.py to test loading of walk model and predict with dummy obs. Run it. Also update train.py to properly train all tasks with more steps and save normalization, but for now focus on verifying the pipeline. If debug succeeds, submit eval again immediately to get a baseline (even if low).
